news.title:
Reliance Infra hits 52-week low at Rs.70.95 on 27 March 2026 amid market weakness.
Stock underperformed sector and key averages due to financial health concerns.
news.summary:
Reliance Infra hits 52-week low at Rs.70.95 on 27 March 2026 amid market weakness.
Stock underperformed sector and key averages due to financial health concerns.

news.title:
Bombay HC partially upholds arbitration award favoring Mumbai Metro One JV, 74% owned by Reliance Infra.
JV to receive estimated INR 516 crore plus interest post 8 weeks; reviewing judgment for further action.
news.summary:
Bombay HC partially upholds arbitration award favoring Mumbai Metro One JV, 74% owned by Reliance Infra.
JV to receive estimated INR 516 crore plus interest post 8 weeks; reviewing judgment for further action.

news.title:
Reliance Infra faces provisional attachment of ₹1,575 crore in subsidiaries over PMLA violations (2017-2019).
The attachment involves BSES Yamuna, BSES Rajdhani, and Mumbai Metro; legal action planned to safeguard interests.
news.summary:
Reliance Infra faces provisional attachment of ₹1,575 crore in subsidiaries over PMLA violations (2017-2019).
The attachment involves BSES Yamuna, BSES Rajdhani, and Mumbai Metro; legal action planned to safeguard interests.

news.title:
Reliance Infrastructure reports a 99.4% drop in net profit and 31.1% fall in net sales.
Low return metrics and high debt burden indicate ongoing operational challenges.
news.summary:
Reliance Infrastructure reports a 99.4% drop in net profit and 31.1% fall in net sales.
Low return metrics and high debt burden indicate ongoing operational challenges.

news.title: Reliance Infra's Q3 revenue declined to 42.96B rupees from 50.3B YoY.
news.summary: Reliance Infra's Q3 revenue declined to 42.96B rupees from 50.3B YoY.

news.title:
Reliance Infra confirms no fund usage deviation; Rs.3,014.4 cr raised via convertible warrants.
Rs.978.6 cr proceeds fully utilized by Dec 2025; ED attached Rs.1,575 cr in subsidiaries.
news.summary:
Reliance Infra confirms no fund usage deviation; Rs.3,014.4 cr raised via convertible warrants.
Rs.978.6 cr proceeds fully utilized by Dec 2025; ED attached Rs.1,575 cr in subsidiaries.

news.title:
Reliance Infra reported Q3 and 9M FY26 results with varied profit-loss figures.
Auditors to resign post-FY26 audit; Odisha Discoms exposure at ₹4,748.1 Cr.
news.summary:
Reliance Infra reported Q3 and 9M FY26 results with varied profit-loss figures.
Auditors to resign post-FY26 audit; Odisha Discoms exposure at ₹4,748.1 Cr.

news.title:
ED attached assets worth Rs 1,575 crore in Reliance Infra subsidiaries over alleged PMLA violations.
Attachments include shares in power, metro firms, bank balances, and receivables amid fund diversion probe.
news.summary:
ED attached assets worth Rs 1,575 crore in Reliance Infra subsidiaries over alleged PMLA violations.
Attachments include shares in power, metro firms, bank balances, and receivables amid fund diversion probe.

news.title:
ED attaches Rs 1,800-cr fresh assets of Reliance Group firms, raising total to Rs 12,000 cr.
The action is part of an ongoing investigation against Reliance Group chairman's companies.
news.summary:
ED attaches Rs 1,800-cr fresh assets of Reliance Group firms, raising total to Rs 12,000 cr.
The action is part of an ongoing investigation against Reliance Group chairman's companies.

news.title:
Reliance Infrastructure's statutory auditor, Chaturvedi & Shah LLP, intends to resign post FY 2025-26 audit citing SEBI allegations of fund misuse.
The company disagrees with the auditor's reasons and plans legal steps; it also filed a SEBI complaint to address market manipulation concerns.
news.summary:
Reliance Infrastructure's statutory auditor, Chaturvedi & Shah LLP, intends to resign post FY 2025-26 audit citing SEBI allegations of fund misuse.
The company disagrees with the auditor's reasons and plans legal steps; it also filed a SEBI complaint to address market manipulation concerns.

news.title:
India Ratings downgraded Reliance Infrastructure's bank loan facilities to IND C from IND B/Stable.
The downgrade follows ED's lien on INR778.6M bank accounts and attached properties worth INR6,690M amid ongoing investigations.
news.summary:
India Ratings downgraded Reliance Infrastructure's bank loan facilities to IND C from IND B/Stable.
The downgrade follows ED's lien on INR778.6M bank accounts and attached properties worth INR6,690M amid ongoing investigations.

news.title: ED freezes 13 bank accounts of Reliance Infrastructure amid financial irregularities probe.
news.summary: ED freezes 13 bank accounts of Reliance Infrastructure amid financial irregularities probe.

news.title:
ED seized assets worth Rs 54.8 crore of Reliance Infra over forex violations.
The seizure includes 13 bank accounts under FEMA Section 37A.
news.summary:
ED seized assets worth Rs 54.8 crore of Reliance Infra over forex violations.
The seizure includes 13 bank accounts under FEMA Section 37A.

news.title:
ADAG stocks, including Reliance Infra and Reliance Power, fell up to 5% after CBI filed a fraud case involving Anil Ambani's son.
Reliance Infra hit a 52-week low, and Reliance Power dropped 4% amid ongoing probes into alleged fraud cases totaling ₹15,380 crore.
news.summary:
ADAG stocks, including Reliance Infra and Reliance Power, fell up to 5% after CBI filed a fraud case involving Anil Ambani's son.
Reliance Infra hit a 52-week low, and Reliance Power dropped 4% amid ongoing probes into alleged fraud cases totaling ₹15,380 crore.

news.title:
Reliance Infra faces ED lien of Rs. 77.9 crore on bank accounts over alleged FEMA violations.
The company plans legally advised steps; SEBI disclosure made public.
news.summary:
Reliance Infra faces ED lien of Rs. 77.9 crore on bank accounts over alleged FEMA violations.
The company plans legally advised steps; SEBI disclosure made public.

news.title:
Reliance Group plans to scale solar and battery manufacturing as key growth pillars.
The move aligns with India's clean energy boom under its future strategy.
news.summary:
Reliance Group plans to scale solar and battery manufacturing as key growth pillars.
The move aligns with India's clean energy boom under its future strategy.

news.title:
Reliance Infra is establishing a cutting-edge integrated solar manufacturing ecosystem.
The facility will cover ingots, wafers, cells, and modules with next-gen tech.
news.summary:
Reliance Infra is establishing a cutting-edge integrated solar manufacturing ecosystem.
The facility will cover ingots, wafers, cells, and modules with next-gen tech.

news.title:
Reliance Infrastructure's Dec 7, 2025, presentation outlines business overview, growth plans, and strategic focus.
Highlights include power distribution, defence, roads, renewables, capital structure, assets, and future roadmap.
news.summary:
Reliance Infrastructure's Dec 7, 2025, presentation outlines business overview, growth plans, and strategic focus.
Highlights include power distribution, defence, roads, renewables, capital structure, assets, and future roadmap.

news.title:
Reliance Infra highlights its diversified portfolio in power, defence, transportation, and renewables, powering 2/3rd of Delhi and operating Mumbai Metro Line 1.
With strategic partnerships in defence and a focus on clean energy, the group targets sustainable growth, aligned with India's Atmanirbhar Bharat vision.
news.summary:
Reliance Infra highlights its diversified portfolio in power, defence, transportation, and renewables, powering 2/3rd of Delhi and operating Mumbai Metro Line 1.
With strategic partnerships in defence and a focus on clean energy, the group targets sustainable growth, aligned with India's Atmanirbhar Bharat vision.

news.title:
ED attached assets worth Rs 10,117 crore citing alleged PMLA violations.
Rs 582 crore assets linked to Reliance Infra; company confirms normal operations.
news.summary:
ED attached assets worth Rs 10,117 crore citing alleged PMLA violations.
Rs 582 crore assets linked to Reliance Infra; company confirms normal operations.
